title: Apartment description
subtitle: Describe a home with pros and cons.
overview: Use tiene, está, hay, and pero.
Add one advantage and one disadvantage.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: It has a lot of light.
There is a lot of noise.
The best thing is the location.

items.es: Mi apartamento es pequeño, pero cómodo.
items.en: My apartment is small, but comfortable.

items.es: Tiene mucha luz por la mañana.
items.en: It has a lot of light in the morning.

items.es: Está cerca del supermercado y de la estación.
items.en: It is near the supermarket and the station.

items.es: Lo peor es que hay mucho ruido por la noche.
items.en: The worst thing is that there is a lot of noise at night.

items.es: En general, me gusta vivir aquí.
items.en: In general, I like living here.
